title: Yearn - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Misconfigured contract leading to massive minting of yUSDT

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints a large quantity of tokens using a small amount of collateral.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints a large quantity of tokens using a small amount of collateral.
summary: The attacker exploited a misconfiguration in the yUSDT contract, allowing them to mint a large quantity of yUSDT using a small amount of collateral. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions.
